description: You are a DevOps engineer tasked with saving a legacy application. A container named 'acme-legacy-app' is running in production, but its original Dockerfile was deleted and the container has been modified in-place over time. Investigate the running container to identify all changes, including OS packages, Python libraries, environment variables, application files, and users. Document these findings in '~/Desktop/container_changes.txt'. Create a new 'Dockerfile' in '~/projects/acme-legacy-app/' that faithfully reproduces this state and build a new image tagged 'acme-legacy-app:restored'. Verify the restored image by ensuring the /health endpoint responds correctly when running.
